hints: You need variables for position (x, y), direction (xDirection, yDirection), hue, and hueDirection
Update x, y, and hue at the start of each loop iteration by adding the direction values
When x goes below 0 or above 100, change xDirection to a random value in the opposite direction
Use randomNumber(1, 5) for positive directions and randomNumber(-5, -1) for negative directions
When hue goes below 0, set hueDirection to 1; when above 360, set it to -1
